name: JotForm
description: JotForm is an online form builder with millions of users. Use this API to create and manage forms, retrieve submissions, manage form questions, and set up webhooks for real-time submission notifications.

capabilities.name: list_forms
capabilities.description: Retrieve all forms in your JotForm account with metadata.

capabilities.name: get_form_submissions
capabilities.description: Get all submissions for a specific form.

capabilities.name: create_submission
capabilities.description: Programmatically submit data to a JotForm form.

capabilities.name: manage_form_questions
capabilities.description: Add, update, or delete questions on a form.

capabilities.name: manage_webhooks
capabilities.description: Register and manage webhooks to receive notifications when forms are submitted.

capabilities.name: get_user_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve your JotForm account info, usage stats, and settings.
